title: Assistant Engineer - Data Centre
description:
Our client is a well established data centre and IT infrastructure company that focuses on providing carrier-neutral data centre services, network connectivity, managed services and related technology solutions.

They are looking for a motivated Assistant Data Centre Engineer to support the day-to-day operations and maintenance of mission-critical data centre infrastructure. In this role, you will work closely with the engineering team to ensure the reliability, availability, and performance of mechanical and electrical systems supporting live and redundant equipment.

Key Responsibilities

Facilities Operations & Maintenance

  • Support Engineers and Senior Engineers in routine maintenance and operational activities
  • Conduct regular system inspections, critical checks, and functional testing
  • Monitor and respond to alarms from BMS and EMS platforms, investigate faults, and assist in corrective actions
  • Provide on-site support during emergency incidents and participate in standby duties as required
  • Assist in planned and reactive maintenance works, including accreditation and certification support
  • Support data centre projects such as installations, system upgrades, and minor construction activities
  • Coordinate with external contractors to ensure works are completed safely and within operational standards
  • Carry out additional duties aligned with operational needs and team objectives

Technical & Customer Support

  • Assist in meeting service level agreements (SLAs) and operational performance targets
  • Support customer activities including equipment installation, move-in coordination, and system turn-on
  • Follow standard operating procedures (SOPs) and comply with all facility management requirements

Requirements

  • Willing to work 24/7 rotating shifts
  • Willing to work at both locations
  • Candidates with no prior experience are welcome as full training will be provided
  • Diploma in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or related disciplines preferred
  • Candidates enrolled in a Work-Study Diploma (Data Centre Infrastructure & Operations or related fields) are welcome
  • Applicants with hands-on experience but without formal qualifications will be considered
  • Good communication skills and a proactive learning attitude

Work Locations

Bedok/Woodlands

(Rotation of location will be required)

Working Hours

Morning Shift: 8.30am - 8.30pm

Night Shift: 8.30pm - 8.30am

(Shifts will rotate every 2 weeks)

Shift pattern: work 3 days rest 3 days, work 2 days rest 2 days

Salary

Up to $3800

Benefits

AWS, Variable Bonus, Allowances, Flexi benefits, 21 days annual leave

Interested candidates kindly click APPLY NOW to submit your latest CV.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Search Avenue Pte Ltd

EA Registration No.: R25157669 [Amanda Wee]

postedCompany.description:
At Search Avenue Pte Ltd, we believe recruitment is more than just filling positions — it’s about building futures. Founded by two passionate individuals with over 12 years of recruitment experience, Search Avenue was born out of a shared vision: to raise the standards of recruitment through integrity, innovation, and unwavering dedication to people.

We are deeply committed to understanding the evolving needs of both employers and candidates. Our approach combines advanced technology with a human touch, ensuring personalized, efficient, and meaningful hiring experiences. Whether it’s permanent placements, executive searches, or talent mapping, our mission remains the same — to connect top-tier talent with companies that value diversity, capability, and culture fit.

Driven by our founders’ belief in work-life harmony, we champion flexible career opportunities and inclusive workplaces. Our goal is to empower individuals to thrive in their careers while honoring their personal commitments — and to help businesses grow stronger through passionate, high-performing teams.

At Search Avenue, recruitment is our craft — and people are our purpose.
